headline: 4 Diversified Operations Stocks to Watch Despite Industry Headwinds
summary: The prospects of the Zacks Diversified Operations industry are hindered by high operating costs and ongoing supply-chain challenges. HON, MMM, ITT and CSL are notable stocks in the industry.
